g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how conv1d with kernel 50 works on ECG signals')
sendPrompt('Why use ReLU activation after convolution?')
sendPrompt('How does max pooling compress the time dimension?')
sendPrompt('Why increase filters from 32 to 64 in deeper layers?')
sendPrompt('What does a kernel size of 20 capture at this depth?')
sendPrompt('Why use global average pooling instead of flatten?')
sendPrompt('How does the fully connected layer classify ECG features?')
